blockingIssues.description: User-facing validation labels in `convex/personaConfigs.ts:52-54,60-62,166-168` still say `Persona configurationuration ...`, so create/edit/import errors surface malformed copy instead of the requested `Persona Configuration` / `persona configuration` terminology.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: After a bulk rename, require a final audit for accidental replacement artifacts in user-visible copy (for example duplicated substrings like `configurationuration`), not just a grep for the old identifier plus tests/typecheck.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: `.factory/skills/rename-worker/SKILL.md:43-44` only requires old-identifier grep verification. This feature passed those checks, but `convex/personaConfigs.ts:52-54,60-62,166-168` and `convex/transcriptExtraction.ts:814-815,860-861` still contain `Persona configurationuration`.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify that dev-only table renames may use a documented clear-and-redeploy path when the mission explicitly allows dropping incompatible development data, instead of always implying an in-repo widen/migrate/narrow implementation.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: `.factory/skills/rename-worker/SKILL.md:48-50` prescribes widen/migrate/narrow, but the completed feature handoff documents a justified deviation: clearing the dev deployment with an empty Convex import before rerunning `bunx convex dev --once` (`handoffs/2026-03-30T22-51-49-628Z__rename-persona-pack-to-persona-config__32b701a6-4a83-42a6-9904-aea787d5d67e.json:68-76`).
